text.title: Research Frameworks Router Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the artefact this methodology produces. The validator script enforces required keys plus per-field constraints; forbidden patterns enumerate shapes the agent must never emit.

example.note: Goal too short / vague; picked_slug 'all' violates pick-exactly-one; rationale + rejected + stage missing.

list.pattern: picked_slug listing more than one framework.
picked_slug not matching an existing methodology slug.
